features.name: localparam unpacked array slice assignment
features.description: Code should include a localparam unpacked array initialized with a slice of another localparam unpacked array using the '+:' slice syntax
features.snippet:
localparam int unsigned LARGE_ARRAY[5] = '{1, 2, 3, 4, 5};
localparam int unsigned SMALL_ARRAY[2] = LARGE_ARRAY[1 +: 2];

features.name: variable slice index on localparam array
features.description: Code should include a slice of a localparam array where the slice start index is a non-constant expression

features.name: array slice used as module parameter
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a parameter value comes from a sliced localparam array
